response.original_title: ការវិលត្រឡប់នៃអាទិទេព
response.overview: Not defined as a film, but rather as a capture of a ritual in four dances by master Khmer artists at sacred sites across Cambodia. These intangible works of art invoke the power that still resides in Cambodia’s ancient temples to call home its stolen antiquities in collections around the world.
response.title: ការវិលត្រឡប់នៃអាទិទេព
